title: [BUG] Colors are not working even I was passing ARGB value it was showing black color
author: kethansai

comments.author: TithSambath
kethansai
comments.body:
Thank you for the reply 🙂. I will check it

Thanks
Kethan vemuri

On Wed, 8 Jan 2025, 10:26 am Tithsambath, ***@***.***> wrote:

> I am able to get this to work by adding both *fgColor* and *bgColor*
>
> cell.style = {
>   fill: {
>     type: "pattern",
>     pattern: "solid",
>     fgColor: { argb: "FFA9D08E" },
>     fgColor: { argb: "FFA9D08E" }
>   }
> };
>
